name: an-dr-editor-selection
description: Status bar showing current line/column and selection info, with copy-path and go-to-line actions.

editorSelection.cursorFormat.description: Status bar text when there is no selection. Placeholders: {line}, {col}.

editorSelection.selectionFormat.description: Status bar text for a single-line selection. Placeholders: {line}, {col}, {chars}.

editorSelection.multilineFormat.description: Status bar text for a multi-line selection. Placeholders: {line}, {col}, {chars}, {selLines}.

editorSelection.showGoToLineButton.description: Show the go-to-line button next to the selection info.

commands.title: Editor Selection: Copy Relative Path and Line
